sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102912" key="telamwni/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τελᾰμων-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n102912.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">στελμονία</ref> </xr> (q.v.) in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:55" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.55</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:142" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.142</biblScope> </bibl> (in the latter place codd. AB have <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τελμονίαι</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
